text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, July 27. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
